title: About the Department of Library and Documentation
content:
About the Department of Library and Documentation

Üsküdar University Libraries,

İbrahim Tarhan Library

at the Central Campus,

at the NP Health Campus,

at the South Campus and

at the NP Faculty of Medicine Campus, aim to provide students, academic and administrative staff with all kinds of information resources they may need for their education, teaching and research activities, and to offer these resources with up-to-date facilities.

The library, organised in an open-shelf system according to the Library of Congress Classification System, houses a rich collection comprising books, printed journals, newspapers, e-books, e-journals, audio cassettes, CDs, DVDs and database resources.

Library in Numbers;

Over 91.000 collections

Over 72.000 e-journals

3.680 thesis

Seating capacity of 3,507
